unique_items.name: Frostbrand
unique_items.lore: A blade of eternal ice, forged in the heart of a dying glacier.

unique_items.name: Staff of the Archmage
unique_items.lore: Once wielded by Theron the Elder, its runes still pulse with arcane power.

unique_items.name: Nightfall
unique_items.lore: A dagger so dark it seems to drink the light around it.

unique_items.name: Hammer of Dreagoth
unique_items.lore: Forged by the dwarven lords who first delved these cursed halls.

unique_items.name: Crown of Shadows
unique_items.lore: A circlet that writhes with living darkness, shielding the wearer from harm.

unique_items.name: Dragonscale Mail
unique_items.lore: Armor crafted from the scales of an ancient black dragon.

unique_items.name: Boots of Haste
unique_items.lore: The wearer moves with supernatural speed, a blur to the naked eye.

unique_items.name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
unique_items.lore: These gauntlets grant their wearer the crushing strength of an ogre.

unique_items.name: Ring of Three Wishes
unique_items.lore: An ancient ring of impossible power. Its wishes were spent long ago, but its magic lingers.

unique_items.name: Amulet of the Void
unique_items.lore: A black gem that whispers secrets of the space between worlds.

unique_items.name: Shield of the Sentinel
unique_items.lore: This shield has never been breached. Its bearers have all died of old age.

unique_items.name: Cloak of Elvenkind
unique_items.lore: Woven from moonlight and spider silk by elven artisans of a forgotten age.

unique_items.name: Voidweaver's Conduit
unique_items.lore: This twisted staff channels the screams of mages who fell to Dreagoth's corruption.

unique_items.name: Circlet of the Fallen King
unique_items.lore: Worn by Dreagoth's last monarch as his realm crumbled into cursed stone.

unique_items.name: Whisperwind's Requiem
unique_items.lore: Carved from heartwood of the Weeping Tree, it sings laments for each soul it claims.

unique_items.name: Soulrend
unique_items.lore: Forged from the dying breath of betrayed assassins, it hungers for treacherous blood.

unique_items.name: Heartstone of Vaelthys
unique_items.lore: Carved from the crystallized heart of a betrayed goddess, it pulses with divine fury.

unique_items.name: Bulwark of the Ironbound
unique_items.lore: Forged from the souls of a thousand fallen knights who swore eternal service to Dreagoth.

unique_items.name: Aegis of Mourning Stars
unique_items.lore: Forged from meteoric iron that fell when the gods wept for Dreagoth's first martyrs.

unique_items.name: Veilkeeper's Binding
unique_items.lore: Forged by the last priestess of Dreagoth to shield her disciples from the whispers of madness.

unique_items.name: Dreagoth's Withering Rod
unique_items.lore: Carved from the spine of the dungeon's first victim, it hungers for mortal essence.

unique_items.name: Oathbreaker's Lament
unique_items.lore: Forged from the shattered crown of a paladin who betrayed his god in Dreagoth's depths.

unique_items.name: Grimfang Cleaver
unique_items.lore: Forged from the jawbone of Dreagoth's first guardian, it hungers for the blood of the living.

unique_items.name: Soulrend Triumph
unique_items.lore: Forged from the tears of a dying god, it devours the essence of those it slays.

unique_items.name: Dominion's Last Grasp
unique_items.lore: Forged from the melted crown of Dreagoth's final king as his empire crumbled.

unique_items.name: Penitent's Wrath
unique_items.lore: Forged from the chains that bound the first heretic, it burns with righteous fury.

unique_items.name: Whisperwind's Betrayal
unique_items.lore: Carved from blackened yew where the elven prince fell to his own arrow's curse.

unique_items.name: Tyrant's Iron Visage
unique_items.lore: Forged from the crown of a fallen warlord, it whispers commands of conquest.

unique_items.name: Dreagoth's Whispered Promise
unique_items.lore: This cursed amulet binds the wearer's soul to the dungeon's ancient master.

unique_items.name: Nightfall's Hunger
unique_items.lore: Forged from the dying breath of assassins who failed to escape Dreagoth's depths.

unique_items.name: Dawnbreaker's Retribution
unique_items.lore: Forged by the last paladin before Dreagoth's fall, its light burns undead flesh.

unique_items.name: Ember of the Fallen
unique_items.lore: This crimson pendant pulses with the dying breath of Dreagoth's first champion.

unique_items.name: Mourning Star Pendant
unique_items.lore: Forged from the tears of the first dungeon keeper, it pulses with ancient sorrow.

unique_items.name: Fists of the Fallen Champion
unique_items.lore: Forged from the bones of Dreagoth's greatest warrior, they crush both steel and spirit.

unique_items.name: Umbral Fang
unique_items.lore: Forged from the shadow of Dreagoth's first victim, it hungers for the light of souls.

unique_items.name: Lightbringer's Retribution
unique_items.lore: Forged by Saint Valoris before his final stand against the demon lords of Dreagoth.

unique_items.name: Sanctum's Broken Oath
unique_items.lore: Once wielded by High Cleric Thaddeus before his faith shattered in Dreagoth's depths.

unique_items.name: Chains of the Penitent
unique_items.lore: Forged from the shackles of heretics who sought redemption in Dreagoth's depths.

unique_items.name: Thornspire's Vengeance
unique_items.lore: Carved from the last treant's heartwood before Dreagoth's curse consumed the surface.

unique_items.name: Robes of the Mad Hierophant
unique_items.lore: Woven from shadowsilk by Dreagoth's first high priest before madness consumed him.

unique_items.name: Bloodmoon Covenant
unique_items.lore: Forged from the crystallized tears of a betrayed archlich, it pulses with malevolent power.

unique_items.name: Voidcaller's Conduit
unique_items.lore: A crystalline staff that once channeled the dying screams of a thousand souls into raw magic.

unique_items.name: Shadowbane Requiem
unique_items.lore: Forged from the tears of paladins who fell defending the first seal against darkness.

unique_items.name: Robes of the Starless Covenant
unique_items.lore: Woven from the shadows of apostate mages who bound their souls to forgotten gods.

unique_items.name: Pendant of Endless Sorrow
unique_items.lore: Carved from the tears of a goddess who wept for ten thousand years over her lost realm.

unique_items.name: Gorecleaver's Lament
unique_items.lore: Forged from the spine of a titan who wept tears of molten iron as he died.

unique_items.name: Bloodpact Signet
unique_items.lore: Forged from the crystallized tears of a betrayed archlich's final servant.

unique_items.name: Nightfall's Lament
unique_items.lore: Carved from blackwood of the hanged god's tree, it weeps spectral arrows that pierce both flesh and soul.

unique_items.name: Crown of Forgotten Oaths
unique_items.lore: Worn by the last high priest who broke his sacred vows to save his dying god.

unique_items.name: Gauntlets of Shattered Oaths
unique_items.lore: Forged from the broken vows of paladins who fell to corruption in Dreagoth's depths.

unique_items.name: Ghostwalker Treads
unique_items.lore: Boots worn by the lost patrol that still wander the cursed halls in eternal search.

unique_items.name: Nexus of Shattered Oaths
unique_items.lore: Forged from the broken vows of thirteen paladins who fell to corruption in Dreagoth's depths.

unique_items.name: Voidscribe's Quill
unique_items.lore: This ethereal staff channels the forbidden words that drove the court scribes mad.

unique_items.name: Hallowed Bone of Saint Malachar
unique_items.lore: Forged from the blessed femur of a martyred saint who fell defending the first seal.

unique_items.name: Heartstone of the Void Priests
unique_items.lore: Carved from the crystallized tears of a dying god, it pulses with forbidden power.

unique_items.name: Bulwark of the Sundered Throne
unique_items.lore: Forged from the melted crown of Dreagoth's last king, it bears his dying curse.

unique_items.name: Crown of Shattered Oaths
unique_items.lore: Forged from the broken vows of thirteen fallen kings who betrayed their realms.

unique_items.name: Voidcaller's Ascension
unique_items.lore: Once wielded by Archmagus Kelthara before the abyss claimed her soul and sanity.

unique_items.name: Warden's Bloodied Hauberk
unique_items.lore: Forged from the chains that bound the first dungeon keeper, it pulses with his dying oath.

unique_items.name: Pendant of Shattered Oaths
unique_items.lore: Worn by the oath-breaking paladin who opened Dreagoth's sealed gates to darkness.

unique_items.name: Martyrdom's Heavy Crown
unique_items.lore: This blessed flail crushed the skulls of heretics until its wielder fell to corruption.

unique_items.name: Circlet of Warding Shadows
unique_items.lore: Forged by the last archmage before Dreagoth's corruption consumed his tower.

unique_items.name: Scepter of Withering Truths
unique_items.lore: Once wielded by Archmagus Veleth, its crystal head shows visions that drove him to madness.

unique_items.name: Shadowbane Circlet
unique_items.lore: Forged from the tears of a dying angel, it repels the whispers of darkness.

unique_items.name: Whisperwind Treads
unique_items.lore: Woven from shadows of the first thieves who died mapping these cursed halls.

unique_items.name: Whisperwind's Last Song
unique_items.lore: This ethereal bow sang its final melody as its elven master fell to shadow wraiths.

unique_items.name: Whisperwind Scepter
unique_items.lore: Carved from the spine of an ancient lich, it channels the screams of the eternally damned.

unique_items.name: Soulforge Medallion
unique_items.lore: Forged from the crystallized screams of a thousand tortured souls in Dreagoth's depths.

unique_items.name: Aegis of the Last Dawn
unique_items.lore: Forged from the final rays of sunlight before Dreagoth's eternal darkness consumed all.

unique_items.name: Dreagoth's Dominion
unique_items.lore: This cursed ring binds the wearer's soul to the dungeon's malevolent will.

unique_items.name: Soulrender's Benediction
unique_items.lore: This blessed flail once belonged to a zealot who cleansed the undead halls with holy fury.

unique_items.name: Soulrender's Lament
unique_items.lore: This cursed blade weeps crimson tears for every soul it has claimed in Dreagoth's depths.
